title: COMMUNITY EDUCATION - 211info
text: ABC HOUSE COMMUNITY EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a community outreach program that includes a variety of trainings. Programs for adult professionals and community members focusing on preventing, identifying, and responding to concerns of child abuse, child sexual abuse, and how to respond. Also offers a girls circle for adolescents to connect and share. Provides presentations for students in kindergarten through 12th grade, using an evidence-based curriculum that covers a variety of topics, such as how to prevent, recognize, and respond appropriately to bullying, cyberbullying, all types of abuse, and digital abuse dangers. Girls Circle is a peer support group that combines creative activity and facilitated discussion to build resiliency, self-efficacy, and self-esteem. 228 SW 5th Avenue Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Presentations: Unrestricted Girls Circle: At-risk girls ages 12-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm by appointment only Girls Circle: 3-4 sessions per year with each session lasting 8-10 weeks. Meetings are held 1 day per week for 2 hours. Email (541) 926-2203 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 926-2203 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties Services: Child Abuse Prevention Child Abuse Support Groups Dating Violence Prevention Internet Safety Education Sexual Assault Prevention Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ABC HOUSE
